site.title: AI Music Pipeline
site.subtitle: Songs written, arranged & produced by multi-agent AI
site.description: An experimental music production system where four AI agents collaborate: a Songwriter, a Singer, a Music Producer, and a Video Producer — each powered by Claude Opus.

tracks.title: While the Light Holds
tracks.tagline: A golden-hour meditation on family, memory, and time passing too fast.

lines: The screen door swings and the kids run out
Barefoot through the grass with their arms flung wide
There's honey in the air and the day cools down
And the first star's barely showing in a lavender sky
Your mother's humming something old
From the porch where the jasmine climbs
And I swear I feel eternity
Folded up inside this evening time
There's an ache beneath my ribs tonight
Like my heart already knows
That the years will try to steal this
But I'm not letting go
Let me live right here while the light holds
Let me feel every second burning slow
With my arms around everything I know
I'm staying right here while the light holds
Your daddy lifts his glass and says a prayer
For the mercy of an ordinary night
The little one's asleep against your chest
Her hand wrapped 'round your finger holding tight
And the radio through the window plays
Some song we'll swear was always ours
And I want to press this into stone
Every voice, every firefly, every star
There's an ache beneath my ribs tonight
Like my heart already knows
That the years will try to steal this
But I'm not letting go
Let me live right here while the light holds
Let me feel every second burning slow
With my arms around everything I know
I'm staying right here while the light holds
I know the morning's coming for these hours
Gonna scatter every shadow from this yard
These babies won't stay babies
And time won't ask us if it's hard
But right now, Lord, right now
This is everything we are
Let me live right here while the light holds
Every second... burning slow
Still golden, still ours
While the light holds

production.style: A slow-burning Americana-soul ballad fused with progressive-electronic architecture — living in the liminal space between a Jason Isbell front-porch fingerpick and an Avicii festival sunrise moment. The acoustic core is never betrayed: Travis-picked guitar, natural room tone, and bluegrass vocal grain remain the emotional spine throughout. Electronic elements lift the song from intimate to anthemic without ever feeling synthetic. The production philosophy is 'campfire to cathedral.'

instrumentation.name: Acoustic Guitar
instrumentation.role: Emotional spine — Travis-picked in verses, open folk strum in choruses, capo 2 playing G shapes

instrumentation.name: Banjo
instrumentation.role: Open-back clawhammer, sparse melodic fills in pre-chorus, fuller rolls in chorus

instrumentation.name: Kick Drum
instrumentation.role: Deep analog 808-meets-Nashville, four-on-the-floor in Chorus 2 with Avicii-style sidechain pump

instrumentation.name: Synth Pad
instrumentation.role: Juno-106-style warm polysynth, low-pass filter sweep builds anticipation through pre-choruses

instrumentation.name: String Section
instrumentation.role: Viola, cello, two violins — sustained pads in Chorus 1, soaring counter-melody in Chorus 2

instrumentation.name: Bass Guitar
instrumentation.role: P-bass with flatwounds, walking descending line A→G#→F#→D, locks with kick in choruses

instrumentation.name: Sub-Bass
instrumentation.role: Sine-wave foundation, sidechained to kick for rhythmic breathing

instrumentation.name: Pedal Steel
instrumentation.role: Weeping fills between vocal phrases in Verse 2, drenched in plate reverb

instrumentation.name: Snare / Clap
instrumentation.role: Organic brush snare layered with soft electronic clap, beats 2 and 4

instrumentation.name: Hi-Hat
instrumentation.role: Humanized 8th notes with 58% swing, enters pre-chorus, opens in choruses

instrumentation.name: Tambourine
instrumentation.role: Light 8th-note shimmer in choruses only, hand-played feel

instrumentation.name: Atmospheric Textures
instrumentation.role: Summer evening field recording under Verse 1, vinyl crackle in bridge — subliminal warmth

production.dynamic_arc: Campfire → Cathedral → Empty Field. The mix opens from naked voice-and-guitar in Verse 1 to full panoramic width in Chorus 2, then strips back to a single whispered line with no reverb at all in the Outro — shockingly intimate after the produced sections.
production.mixing_philosophy: Verses are narrow and intimate — guitar and voice clustered in the center 30% of the stereo field. Choruses are panoramic, elements spread across the full field. The Bridge collapses to mono. The final whispered line gets no reverb. Target loudness: -11 LUFS, preserving 8–10 dB of dynamic range between bridge and chorus peaks.
